title: Quantum computing webinar
subtitle: Exploring the future of computing through quantum technologies. Empowering students with knowledge and innovation in the quantum era.
description:
Title of the event: Quantum Computing Webinar 
 Objective: The objective of this event was to inculcate the importance and the growth of quantum computing over time. This would equip students and academicians to research and create new innovations in the quantum computing space. BVP Optica organised a Webinar on Quantum Computing and invited Dr. Nagrath, Founder CEO of Qpi Technologies which is at the forefront in India in terms of Quantum Tech. Quantum computers have the potential to revolutionize industries.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Insights into real-world applications across industries.
Understanding of future scope and innovations in quantum technology.
